acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Only one active delivery worker per repository while different repositories remain parallel.
Opaque repository identities are preserved and missing identity fails closed.
The capacity owner can resume after retry without deadlock.
Complete local and GitHub validation passes at the exact PR HEAD.

residualRisk.risk: Distributed fencing across multiple independent runners is not required for the single-X1 topology and remains documented.

summary: Exact HEAD satisfies repository capacity, recovery, quality, security and CI acceptance.
